content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally today across pharma, FMCG, capital goods, defense, financials and chemicals — many of my held names showing strong gains intraday. Global cues bullish (S&P +1.46%, Nasdaq +2%). However, I'm carrying 11 fresh CNC positions all at 0 days, several at meaningful unrealized gains versus entry; priority is to TRAIL stop-losses on winners to lock in book value, not add new exposure. Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.7% — capital preservation dominates.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70 = +7.4% unrealized. SL already at 1035 (above entry) which is breakeven+5%. CMP-SL gap = 21.7/1056 = 2.05%, comfortably above the 1% trail-gap floor. Thesis intact (Q4 beat, dual broker upgrades). Holding SL at 1035 — already a meaningful trail; no further tightening needed (would risk forced exit on intraday chop given ATR). Target 1110 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 = -0.8%. SL 121 (-3.3% from entry) intact. Defensive hedge for portfolio; gold rally cooling but May 6 rebound shows buyers stepping in. Hold as portfolio insurance. Stored SL 121 within tolerance, no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1725.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10 = +3.4% unrealized. SL already at 1725 (above entry, locking +1.5%). CMP-SL gap = 32.10/1757 = 1.83%, above 1% floor. Q4 beat solid; governance overhang noted but not new news. Keep SL at 1725 — already trailed appropriately. No-op confirmation; holding stored levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40 = +1.2%. SL 4540 (-0.8% from entry, locked-in near breakeven). CRITICAL: Q4 board meeting May 14 (5 trading sessions away) is approaching binary event window. Will reassess by Day-21 (3 sessions before event) per binary-event rule — must EXIT or trim to ≤5% before May 14. Target 4875 = JM Financial TP. Holding stored levels for now; no SL change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 = +2.2%. SL 6960 (above entry, locking +0.9%). CMP-SL gap = 89/7049 = 1.26%, just above 1% floor. Q4 record results, multiple broker Buys (Geojit 8500, Jefferies 8385). Thesis strong. Stored SL 6960 already a meaningful trail — holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20 = +0.86%. SL 836 essentially at entry. Holding stored levels — gain too small to trail tighter (would breach 1% floor). Target 900 unchanged. Q4 results pending; will reassess as binary event approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 = -0.08% (essentially flat). At fresh ATH on Q4 beat (+30% PAT). SL 365 (-1.1%) intact. Holding stored levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 = +0.3%. Q4 print strong (+22% rev), at fresh ATH. SL 815 (-0.6%). Gain too small for meaningful trail. Holding stored levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1253.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10 = +1.6%. Q4 blockbuster (PAT +130%, EBIT +370bps), 10% upper circuit hit yesterday. SL 1253 (-0.5%). Gain modest, holding stored levels for now; will trail higher once gain crosses +2% threshold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 = +0.3%. Q4 strong, defense theme intact, +9.2% today. SL 2990 (-1.2%). Note daily candles show high volatility (May-4 dropped to 2778). Holding stored SL — too tight a trail risks stop-out on next pullback."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 = +0.16%. Just bought today on Q4 beat gap-up. SL 800 (-0.7%). Holding stored levels — minimal gain, no trail justification yet."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1035 (+5% above entry), locking in solid book gain with 2% breathing room from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge holding; small unrealized loss within SL budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1725.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks in gain; CMP-SL gap healthy."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "reasoning": "May 14 board meeting approaching — will exit/trim by Day-21 per binary-event rule. SL near breakeven adequate for now."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry, gap to CMP 1.26% — adequate trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "Gain too small to trail tighter without breaching 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat; SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Small gain, SL within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1253.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% gain not yet at 2% breakeven-trail threshold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "reasoning": "Defense PSU has high volatility (May-4 -7.5% intraday range); tighter trail would risk forced exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; no trail justification yet."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "POLYCAB, GABRIEL, NEULANDLAB, HDFCBANK, TITAGARH (sector exposure already via held name), GRSE (already held) — most are at or near 52-wk highs after Q4 prints, momentum-chase risk. NEULANDLAB has May 12 board meeting binary AND Q3 PAT collapsed -60% — explicit avoid. HDFCBANK weak NII growth, lagging peers — pass. POLYCAB above Morgan Stanley TP — would chase. Will revisit if these pull back to support. AUROPHARMA, LUPIN, BAJAJ-AUTO, VEDL, HINDPETRO, BHARATFORG, DABUR, M&M, SRF, CHOLAHLDNG, LAURUSLABS — not requested deep data; pass for now.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed today across 11 CNC names spanning HFC, gold ETF, ports, defense (HAL+GRSE — defense cluster watch), specialty chem, capital goods (TITAGARH+GRSE — capital goods cluster), IT (COFORGE), FMCG (MARICO), financial services (ABCAPITAL+CAMS+PNBHOUSING — financials cluster). Cluster monitor: financials = ~30% (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS), capital goods = HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE = significant defense/cap-goods cluster. NO new entries today — focus on managing existing book. HFCL pending OPEN order from prior session (1858m ago = ~31 hours, stale) — leaving alone for execution layer to expire. CRITICAL FORWARD ITEM: HAL board meeting May 14 (5 sessions away) requires explicit binary-event disposition decision by next 1-2 sessions. Cumulative P&L -53.7% demands strict capital preservation; no new BUYs into a strong-up day at extended levels."
}
